title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 536.033 - Sale of register and code of state regulations, cost, how established — correction of clerical errors authorized
text:
536.033.  Sale of register and code of state regulations, cost, how established — correction of clerical errors authorized. — 1.  Copies or subscription of the register or code shall be made available to the public by the secretary of state upon request for a reasonable charge to be established by the secretary of state, not to exceed the actual cost of publishing and delivery.
  2.  All fees collected from the sale of the Missouri Register or the code of state regulations by the secretary of state shall be deposited to general revenue.
  3.  The secretary of state may correct typographical or spelling errors in the publication of any rule, notice of proposed rulemaking, or order of rulemaking.
(L. 1975 S.B. 58, A.L. 1976 S.B. 478, A.L. 1981 S.B. 101, A.L. 2019 H.B. 1088)
